commit_title: Persist stores per-workspace and add IDB storage
commit_message: Add idb-keyval and a zustand-compatible idbStorage wrapper, and migrate multiple Zustand stores to persisted, workspace-scoped storage. CSV store now uses IndexedDB (idbStorage) via createJSONStorage; other vanilla stores (axis, color, filter, group, inkRatio, plotLayout, traceConfig, workspaceLocal) were wrapped with zustand persist and given names prefixed with the workspace id. WorkspaceContext now constructs stores with the current workspaceId. WorkspaceStore itself is persisted and will remove workspace-specific persisted keys when a workspace is removed. TopMenuBar: add a "New Project" action that clears idb-keyval storage and localStorage then reloads the app. Also ensure workspaceLocalStore excludes non-serializable popupContent from persistence.
